mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user ( email, password, provider, provider_id, nickname, profile_image, birthday, gender, phone, status, postcode, address, detail_address, created_at ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{password}, #{provider}, #{providerId}, #{nickname}, #{profileImage}, #{birthday}, #{gender}, #{phone}, 'active', #{postcode}, #{address}, #{detailAddress}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM user WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_terms (user_id, terms_id, agreed, agreed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{termsId}, #{agreed}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT type, version, content, is_required AS isRequired FROM terms
SELECT id AS id, name AS interestName, icon_name AS iconName FROM interests
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, terms_id AS termsId, agreed FROM user_terms WHERE user_id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, interest_id AS interestId FROM user_interests WHERE user_id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET email = #{email}, nickname = #{nickname}, profile_image = #{profileImage}, birthday = #{birthday}, gender = #{gender}, phone = #{phone}, postcode = #{postcode}, address = #{address}, detail_address = #{detailAddress} WHERE id = #{userId}
